citations.quote: The outstanding arrears for your accommodation are £4605.55
From Donnelly, Kathleen <K.Donnelly@napier.ac.uk> on behalf of fees <fees@napier.ac.uk> Date Wed 08/04/2026 13:29 To Elbushra, Anfal <40805511@live.napier.ac.uk>
If you have made payments, please send copies of your receipts.
Kathleen Donnelly Senior Finance Assistant Edinburgh Napier University Finance Sighthill Campus Sighthill Court Edinburgh EH11 4BN Tel 0131 455 6806

findings.text: Email sent by Kathleen Donnelly on behalf of fees@napier.ac.uk to Anfal Elbushra on 08/04/2026.
Email requests recipient to send copies of receipts if payments were made.
No payment history, receipts, or payment records are present in source NAP-SRC-0021. Task objective cannot be met from this source alone.

proposed_artifacts.content: Task T-09-002: Obtain payment history and receipts. Source NAP-SRC-0021 (email from Kathleen Donnelly to Anfal Elbushra dated 08/04/2026) states accommodation arrears of £4605.55 and requests receipts if payments were made. No payment history, receipts, or payment records are present in this source. A follow-up task is proposed to request payment records from Edinburgh Napier University Finance (contact: Kathleen Donnelly, Tel 0131 455 6806, or Studentfunding@napier.ac.uk).
proposed_artifacts.title: Payment history and receipts - gap analysis

proposed_tasks.instructions: Request payment history and receipts from Edinburgh Napier University Finance for Anfal Elbushra's accommodation account. Contact Kathleen Donnelly (Senior Finance Assistant, Tel 0131 455 6806) or Studentfunding@napier.ac.uk. Obtain records of any payments made, dates, amounts, and method of payment. Also request a statement of the arrears balance as of the current date.
proposed_tasks.title: Request payment records from Edinburgh Napier University

risk_flags.description: No payment history or receipts available in the provided source.

summary: Task T-09-002 (Obtain payment history and receipts) has no payment history or receipts in the provided source NAP-SRC-0021. The source is an email from Edinburgh Napier University to Anfal Elbushra dated 08/04/2026 stating accommodation arrears of £4605.55 and requesting receipts if payments were made. No payment records, receipts, or payment history are present. A follow-up task is proposed to request these records from the university.

uncertainties.reason: Source NAP-SRC-0021 contains only an arrears notification email; no payment records or receipts are included.
